_doc: Resumable state for the autonomous honing gym (SOP docs/sop/autonomous-honing-methodology.md §6/§10). The /loop driver and gym.workflow.js read this FIRST every wake. Edit by the loop only; humans edit `gate`/`autonomy`/`goal`.
goal: Get all 4 source specialists to beat their LIVE twin by >= targetMargin on held-out, grounded (grounding floor held), with the warm-baton multi-turn flow intact — honing ONLY on shadows, promoting winners to live in one gated batch.
doneCriteria: For each specialist: shadow composite >= live composite + targetMargin on the held-out split for sustainRounds consecutive rounds, grounding floor never regressed, zero new flagged claims. Then E2E warm-baton judged non-regressed. Then (gated) promote.

config.splitRule: first ceil(n/2) bank questions = dev, remainder = held-out

autonomy.judgeTrust: INDICATIVE — P2b human-rank calibration NOT done; judge scores are directional only. Real keep/rollback decisions require a human spot-check gate every `gateEveryRounds` rounds until P2b passes (Spearman >= 0.7).
autonomy.deploySafetyInvariant: deploy() MUST refuse any agent whose name does not end in '-shadow'. Live ac2-*-neural is the gated PROMOTE target only.

blockers: P2b judge calibration (Spearman >= 0.7 vs Arijit's blind ranking) is NOT done — the gym's fitness function is unproven. Per SOP §8, do NOT run the autonomous optimization loop in trust mode until P2b passes. Until then: run in spot-check-gated mode (human approves each kept patch) or only smoke-test the mechanics.

baseline.kind: SMOKE (SUP-1 only, on shadow) — NOT the full-bank baseline

support.nextAction: Measure the FULL support bank baseline on BOTH ac2-support-shadow (ours) and ac2-support-neural (live floor), split dev/held-out, before round 1.

tech.nextAction: node clone_shadow.mjs tech, then measure baseline.

academy.nextAction: node clone_shadow.mjs academy, then measure baseline.

marketer.nextAction: node clone_shadow.mjs marketer, then measure baseline.

nextAction: BLOCKED on P2b (judge calibration). When unblocked: run gym.workflow.js (or /loop with gym_driver.md) starting at unit=support. Until then the mechanics are proven (shadow + eval path) and the loop is authored but not run in trust mode.
